data.title: Toncoin Price Surges Following Telegram Founder Pavel Durov's Release from France
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, the price of Toncoin (TON) experienced a significant surge of over 6% following the release of Telegram founder Pavel Durov from France. Durov had been detained in the country since his arrest in August 2024. CoinMarketCap data indicates that TON's price has increased by approximately 18% in the last 24 hours and over 13% in the past week.

The arrest of Durov in France on August 24, 2024, had a profound impact on Toncoin's value, causing it to plummet by more than 35%, from around $6.88 to $4.44 by September 2024. However, the digital asset reached a peak of $7.20 on December 4, 2024, during a historic rally in the cryptocurrency markets, which coincided with the re-election of U.S. President Donald Trump. Despite this rally, TON's price later collapsed by approximately 67%, hitting a low of $2.36 on March 11, 2025.

Toncoin, the cryptocurrency of The Open Network, operates independently of the Telegram platform but has become popular among its users. The news of Durov's release was celebrated by Telegram and TON users, who viewed it as a victory for freedom of speech amid ongoing debates about online security and freedom of expression.

Pavel Durov reportedly received permission to leave France on March 13, allowing him to travel to Dubai. According to the AFP news agency, unnamed sources confirmed his departure from France, with some sources suggesting that Durov was granted permission to leave for "several weeks." It remains uncertain whether the legal case against him has been resolved in French courts or if he has been granted temporary travel time while the case is still under arbitration.

French law enforcement officials have accused Telegram of enabling illegal activities by not censoring the messaging platform, leading to charges against Durov and his detention in France as part of a bail agreement. Durov has described the arrest as unnecessary, stating that Telegram maintains a representative in the European Union to address legal requests. He emphasized that both he and the company would have cooperated with French authorities if a proper legal request had been made.

data.title: ‘Be on Guard’: Trader Says Altcoin Bounce May Be Temporary, Tracks Bitcoin’s Next Targets
data.description:
A widely followed crypto analyst and trader is warning that an altcoin market bounce may end up being short-lived. He also says Bitcoin (BTC) […]

data.title: Bitcoin’s role as an inflation hedge depends on where one lives — Analyst
data.description:
For years, inflation was primarily a concern for emerging markets, where volatile currencies and economic instability made rising prices a persistent challenge. However, in the wake of the COVID-19 pandemic, inflation became a global issue. Once-stable economies with historically low inflation were suddenly grappling with soaring costs, prompting investors to rethink how to preserve their...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-s-role-as-inflation-hedge-depends-on-where-one-lives-analyst?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Russia Utilizes Crypto for Oil Exports to China and India
data.description:
Russia is using cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin, Ethereum and Tether to facilitate oil exports to China and India, circumventing Western sanctions.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/china/russia-utilizes-crypto-for-oil-exports-to-china-and-india/

data.title: BNB Surpasses 600 USDT with a 2.29% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 15, 2025, 15:41 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 600 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 600.390015 USDT, with a narrowed 2.29% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences Significant Liquidations
data.description: According to PANews, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed liquidations totaling $98.53 million over the past 24 hours. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $48.31 million, while short positions saw liquidations of $50.21 million. Bitcoin (BTC) experienced liquidations amounting to $25 million, and Ethereum (ETH) saw $9.36 million in liquidations.

data.title: TON Foundation confirms Pavel Durov has obtained his passport
data.description: The TON Foundation posted on X that it congratulated TON founder Pavel Durov on getting his passport and being allowed to leave France freely. The TON Foundation said that as part of the decentralized TON community, it will continue to support Pavel Durov.
